ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bands" (
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each band */,
  "band_number" INTEGER /* Band number or identifier */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the band is located */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of data collection for the band */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of data collection for the band */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the band */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source used for the band */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection (e.g., field survey, satellite imagery) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the band data was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the band (e.g., active, inactive, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("band_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bands_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bands_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Land use type (e.g., forest, agricultural, urban) */,
  "habitat_type" TEXT /* Type of habitat (e.g., wetland, grassland) */,
  "last_surveyed" TEXT /* Date when the site was last surveyed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "band_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the band where the sample was collected */,
  "sample_position" TEXT /* Position of the sample within the band */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sample location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sample location */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "date_utilized" TEXT /* Date when the sample was utilized or processed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the sample */,
  "sample_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of sample collected */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data collected (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "collected_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who collected the sample */,
  "sample_depth" REAL /* Depth of the sample (if applicable, e.g., for soil samples) */,
  "sample_weight" REAL /* Weight of the sample (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_band_id FOREIGN KEY ("band_id") REFERENCES bands ("band_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_sample_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_type_id") REFERENCES sample_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_collected_by FOREIGN KEY ("collected_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vegetation_cover" (
  "cover_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cover measurement */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample where the cover was measured */,
  "basal_area" INTEGER /* Basal area of the vegetation */,
  "canopy_cover" INTEGER /* Percentage of canopy cover */,
  "litter_cover" INTEGER /* Percentage of litter cover */,
  "herbaceous_cover" INTEGER /* Percentage of herbaceous plant cover */,
  "shrub_cover" INTEGER /* Percentage of shrub cover */,
  "tree_cover" INTEGER /* Percentage of tree cover */,
  "bare_ground_cover" INTEGER /* Percentage of bare ground cover */,
  "other_cover" INTEGER /* Percentage of other cover */,
  "density" INTEGER /* Density of vegetation */,
  "canopy_cover_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of canopy cover */,
  "litter_cover_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of litter cover */,
  "herbaceous_cover_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of herbaceous cover */,
  "shrub_cover_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of shrub cover */,
  "tree_cover_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of tree cover */,
  "bare_ground_cover_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of bare ground cover */,
  "other_cover_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of other cover */,
  "measured_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who measured the cover */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the cover was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cover_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vegetation_cover_other_cover_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("other_cover_type_id") REFERENCES vegetation_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vegetation_cover_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vegetation_cover_herbaceous_cover_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("herbaceous_cover_type_id") REFERENCES vegetation_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vegetation_cover_bare_ground_cover_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("bare_ground_cover_type_id") REFERENCES vegetation_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vegetation_cover_measured_by FOREIGN KEY ("measured_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vegetation_cover_tree_cover_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("tree_cover_type_id") REFERENCES vegetation_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vegetation_cover_canopy_cover_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("canopy_cover_type_id") REFERENCES vegetation_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vegetation_cover_shrub_cover_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("shrub_cover_type_id") REFERENCES vegetation_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vegetation_cover_litter_cover_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("litter_cover_type_id") REFERENCES vegetation_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_size" REAL /* Size of the image in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the image was uploaded */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., JPEG, PNG) */,
  "image_resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the image (e.g., 1920x1080) */,
  "captured_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who captured the image */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_captured_by FOREIGN KEY ("captured_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental metric */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample where the metric was measured */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the sample location */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the sample location */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Soil moisture content */,
  "soil_ph" REAL /* Soil pH level */,
  "light_intensity" REAL /* Light intensity at the sample location */,
  "temperature_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of temperature measurement */,
  "humidity_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of humidity measurement */,
  "soil_moisture_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of soil moisture measurement */,
  "soil_ph_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of soil pH measurement */,
  "light_intensity_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of light intensity measurement */,
  "measured_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who measured the metrics */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_metrics_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_metrics_humidity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("humidity_type_id") REFERENCES environmental_metrics_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_metrics_soil_ph_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("soil_ph_type_id") REFERENCES environmental_metrics_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_metrics_soil_moisture_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("soil_moisture_type_id") REFERENCES environmental_metrics_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_metrics_measured_by FOREIGN KEY ("measured_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_metrics_light_intensity_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("light_intensity_type_id") REFERENCES environmental_metrics_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_metrics_temperature_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("temperature_type_id") REFERENCES environmental_metrics_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user has admin privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sample type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the sample type is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the sample type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample type was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vegetation_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vegetation type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vegetation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vegetation type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the vegetation type is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the vegetation type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the vegetation type was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_metrics_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental metric type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the environmental metric type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the environmental metric type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the metric type is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the metric type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric type was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the data source is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data source */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
